description_full:
Business Analyst – Communications Analytics

Contract Type: Freelance/B2B

Contract Length: Until September 2026 (extensions likely)




Overview

An international organisation within the energy and technology sector is seeking an experienced Business Analyst to support its Communications Analytics function.




This role focuses on interpreting communications and digital performance data and transforming it into meaningful insights that support strategic decision making across global communications teams. The successful consultant will act as the bridge between analytics and business stakeholders, ensuring insights are clear, relevant, and actionable.




This is not a technical data engineering or data science role. The focus is on business analysis, stakeholder engagement, insight generation, and communications performance interpretation.







Key Responsibilities

Analyze communications data across digital channels, campaigns, media intelligence, and listening platforms
Identify patterns, risks, opportunities, and actionable insights from existing datasets and dashboards
Deliver insight-driven recommendations tailored to communications stakeholders and leadership audiences
Partner closely with digital communications experts, campaign leads, and content owners
Create presentations, executive summaries, and leadership-ready reporting materials
Support the evolution from descriptive reporting toward insight-led communications decision making
Challenge assumptions and encourage more data-informed ways of working
Contribute to continuous improvement within communications analytics processes and workflows




Required Skills & Experience

Proven experience as a Business Analyst, Communications Analyst, or Insights Analyst
Strong understanding of Corporate Communications and digital communications channels
Experience interpreting communications performance metrics and campaign analytics
Comfortable working with dashboards, reporting tools, and structured datasets
Strong stakeholder engagement and consulting skills
Excellent communication and presentation capabilities
Ability to simplify complex information into business-friendly insights
Strong analytical, interpretative, and problem-solving skills
Proactive, structured, and outcome-oriented approach




Nice to Have

Experience within large international or matrix organisations
Exposure to media intelligence or social listening tools
Experience supporting communications transformation initiatives
Familiarity with leadership reporting environments

description_full:
Wir gehören zu den Top-Adressen in der IT-Welt und fokussieren uns auf die Optimierung der Kerngeschäfts­prozesse unserer Kunden. Durch den smarten Einsatz maßgeschneiderter IT-Lösungen unterstützen wir unsere Kunden dabei, das Beste aus ihrem Business und aktuellen Technologien herauszuholen. Unseren Erfolg aber erreichen wir nur durch eins: die Menschen bei adesso! Sie bringen Ideen, fachliches Know how und Technologien zusammen. Gemeinsam programmieren wir (deine) Zukunft bei adesso.

DEINE ROLLE


Analytics-Konzeption: Entwickle Analytics-Strategien und konzipiere individuelle Lösungen für komplexe Herausforderungen in Web- und App-Projekten.
Implementierung: Implementiere Analytics-Tools und richte Tag-Management-, Tracking- und Consent-Management-Systeme für unsere Kunden ein.
Reporting & Dashboards: Erstelle Berichte und interaktive Dashboards, visualisiere Ergebnisse und interpretiere diese gemeinsam mit internen Teams im Online Marketing.
Compliance & Prozesse: Optimiere Prozesse und unterstütze unsere Kunden dabei, technische und rechtliche Anforderungen wie die Cookie-Compliance einzuhalten.
Wissensvermittlung: Vermittle Wissen, indem du interne und externe Schulungen zu Analytics-Themen durchführst.
Strategische Beratung: Berate Kunden und begleite sie beim strategischen Ausbau ihres Trackings.


DEIN PROFIL


Analytics- und Tracking-Systeme: Durch deine mehrjährige Berufserfahrung (mind. 3 Jahre) kennst du bereits Tools wie Piwik PRO, Matomo oder Google Analytics und bist mit Tag-Management- und Dashboard-Systemen vertraut. Aber auch Consent Management Plattformen sind dir nicht unbekannt und du verstehst die Funktion von Cookie Bannern auf Webseiten und in Mobile Apps.
Online-Marketing Expertise: Insbesondere datengetriebene Kampagnen gehören zu deinem Fachwissen.
Technisches Verständnis: Du bringst fundiertes Know-how in Webtechnologien und Programmiersprachen wie HTML, CSS und JavaScript mit.
Kenntnisse zur strategischen Analytics-Beratung: Idealerweise bringst du erste Erfahrung mit ganzheitlichen Datenstrategien für Unternehmen mit und bist begeisterungsfähig für technologische Entwicklungen und Trends im Analytics-Bereich.
Kommunikationsstärke: Du bist vertriebsorientiert und begeisterst andere für das Thema Digital Marketing.
KI Kompetenz: Du setzt KI-Tools in deinem Fachgebiet souverän ein, bewertest die Ergebnisse kritisch und unterstützt Kunden und adessi dabei, Potenziale von KI zu nutzen.
Sprachkenntnisse: Deine sehr guten Deutsch- und guten Englischkenntnisse ermöglichen dir eine sichere Kommunikation.


Unser Versprechen: Du wirst dich bei uns wohlfühlen! Kollegial, familiär und auf Augenhöhe – wir leben Austausch, Teamgeist und einen respektvollen Umgang miteinander. Diversität und verschiedene Blickwinkel werden bei uns genauso geschätzt wie du als Mensch. Das und viel mehr steht für unser ganz besonderes Wir-Gefühl. Für das es sogar ein Wort gibt: adessi.

Unsere Kultur und das Zusammenarbeiten sind geprägt von gegenseitiger Wertschätzung, Anerkennung und Unterstützung. Das verbindet uns hierarchieübergreifend – auch im Home-Office. So belegen wir zum wiederholten Mal den 1. Platz beim Wettbewerb „Deutschlands Beste Arbeitgeber in der ITK“!. Unser umfangreiches Trainingsangebot und ein transparentes Laufbahnstufenmodell für alle sorgen dafür, dass deine Entwicklung bei uns nicht stillsteht. Denn gemeinsam zu wachsen und Chancengeber zu sein, das ist programmiert in unserer DNA.

description_full:
Sika is a specialty chemicals company with a globally leading position in the development and production of systems and products for bonding, sealing, damping, reinforcing, and protection in the building sector and industrial manufacturing. Sika has subsidiaries in 103 countries around the world and, in over 400 factories, produces innovative technologies for customers worldwide. In doing so, it plays a crucial role in enabling the transformation of the construction and transportation sector toward greater environmental compatibility. With more than 33,000 employees, the company generated sales of CHF 11.20 billion in 2025.





Job Description



In this role you support the Data Center Vertical Market team across EMEA by providing technical, administrative and project documentation support related to project submittals, calculations and specification preparation. The role works closely with Vertical Market Managers and local organizations to improve efficiency in project preparation, support successful project and product sales conversion, and enable the Data Center team to increase focus on customer engagement and pipeline development.



Support preparation and coordination of technical submittals, calculations and project documentation for Data Center projects across EMEA
Assist Vertical Market Managers and local organizations with project documentation, specification support and customer technical requirements
Support successful conversion of project and product sales through timely and accurate preparation of technical documentation
Contribute to optimization and standardization of submittal preparation processes to improve efficiency and consistency across the region
Coordinate with Corporate Target Markets, technical teams and local organizations to collect required project and product information
Support Commercial Product Rollout activities by assisting local organizations with technical documentation, positioning materials and product-related support
Support the collection and translation of market, customer and technical insights into actionable improvements and alignment with Corporate functions and R&D teams
Ensure transparent tracking and organization of supported projects and documentation activities.
Contribute towards a positive team environment and spirit with colleagues, supervisors and local organizations
Build and maintain strong internal networks across Corporate, Regional and local organizations, supporting collaboration and contributing to the effectiveness of the Data Center Vertical Market team


Qualifications


Technical or Engineering degree within Construction Technology, Civil Engineering, Mechanical/Electrical Engineering, or related field advantageous
2–5 years of experience in technical support, specification management, project coordination or construction-related documentation, experience supporting large projects or technical submittals preferred
Exposure to Data Centers or technical construction environments advantageous
Strong Microsoft Office skills (especially Excel, PowerPoint, Word)
Experience with technical documentation and submittal preparation, CRM systems (Salesforce preferred
Ability to work with technical calculations and project documentation
Fluent English mandatory; any additional European language is a plus
Travel within EMEA as required to support project execution and customer engagement (approx. 25–30%)


Additional Information


We offer intensive training and interesting perspectives for anyone who wants to build a career
Sika is like a global SME: With subsidiaries in more than 100 countries around the world. This begins in Switzerland and breaks down borders allowing exciting prospects all around the world
The chance to bring new ideas, interesting areas for development, and taking responsibility early on are some of the key factors that drive Sika's pioneering spirit

We look forward to your application. For this position visa sponsorship is not offered and only direct applications will be considered. For any further information please reach us at inbox.hr@ch.sika.com



We offer competitive salaries, aligned with local market benchmarks and the specific scope and responsibilities of each role. Compensation is determined based skills relevant to the position, education and/or training.  We are committed to fair and equitable pay practices in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.

Mit rund 470.000 Mitarbeitenden weltweit eröffnen wir hervorragende Karrierechancen - getragen von einem starken „Wir“ und einer Vielfalt an Perspektiven und Fähigkeiten.

Du willst im Bereich Strategy, Risk & Transactions – Advisory – Mergers & Acquisitions Kunden entlang des gesamten M&A-Deal-Zyklus begleiten – von Strategie und Due Diligence über Finanzierungs- und Technologiefragen bis hin zur erfolgreichen Umsetzung und Integration von Transaktionen? Unser Team unterstützt Mandanten beim Kauf, Verkauf oder Zusammenschluss von Unternehmen - strategisch, finanziell und rechtlich. Sichere unseren gemeinsamen Erfolg und mach mit uns den Unterschied: als Senior Consultant Data Analytics & Business Insights (m/w/d).

Standorte: Berlin, Düsseldorf, Frankfurt (Main), Hamburg und München.

Dein Impact:

Als Senior Consultant Data Analytics & Business Insights (m/w/d) berätst du Mandanten bei komplexen M&A-Transaktionen – und kombinierst dabei Finance-Expertise mit Data Analytics, um nachhaltige Entscheidungen zu ermöglichen.


Data Analytics: Mit Hilfe modernster Analytics-Methoden bereitest du große Datenmengen effizient auf, erkennst Muster und prüfst Hypothesen datenbasiert – unterstützt durch unsere etablierten Best Practices.
Datenmuster: Du identifizierst Datenmuster, um aufgestellte Hypothesen zu prüfen, und verknüpfst entscheidungsrelevante Daten und Informationen.
Visualisierung: Interaktive Dashboards konzipierst du mit Business-Intelligence-Tools, sodass komplexe Finanzinformationen für Stakeholder verständlich dargestellt werden.
Stakeholder-Kommunikation: In deinen Projekten generierst du gemeinsam mit Data-Science-Experten wertschaffende Einblicke und kommunizierst datenbasierte Entscheidungsvorlagen an ausgewählte Stakeholder.
Dokumentation & Weiterbildung: Du unterstützt bei der Erstellung von Investor Documents wie Data Books und Due-Diligence-Berichten und entwickelst dein Wissen zu neuen Technologien und Methoden kontinuierlich weiter.


Dein Skillset:


Sehr guter Masterabschluss in Wirtschaftswissenschaften, Finance, Accounting oder einem vergleichbaren Studiengang sowie fundiertes betriebswirtschaftliches Fachwissen
Mehrjährige relevante Berufserfahrung im Bereich M&A oder Corporate Finance, idealerweise auch Carve-out- oder komplexe Deal-Erfahrungen
Fundiertes Wissen in Accounting, Financial Modeling und Unternehmensbewertung
Kenntnisse in Programmiersprachen wie R, Python, SQL sowie Erfahrung mit Business-Intelligence-Tools wie Power BI oder Qlik Sense
Deutsch und Englisch sehr gut in Wort und Schrift, Kommunikationsstärke und Präsentationssicherheit


Deine Chance:


Best-in-class Weiterbildung an der Deloitte University sowie im Rahmen individueller Qualifikationsangebote und Trainings
Umfassende Entwicklungschancen durch strukturierte Karriereplanung, Inclusive Leadership, Entsendungsprogramme, projektbasierte Job-Rotation sowie Förderung sozialen Engagements und Corporate Volunteering
Vereinbarkeit von Beruf & Familie dank Mobile Working & Teilzeit, Sabbaticals und Familienservice, z. B. zur Unterstützung für pflegende Angehörige, Elternzeit-Beratung und vielem mehr
Gesundheit & Fitness im Fokus durch regelmäßige Gesundheitstage, Kooperationen mit Fitness-Anbietern und die Unterstützung von Sport- und Teamevents
Attraktive Arbeitgeberleistungen inklusive Bike- und Pkw-Leasing, Firmen-Smartphone zur privaten Nutzung sowie flexiblen Arbeitsmodellen wie z. B. Vertrauensarbeitszeit und EU Remote Working
Vielfältige Gestaltungsspielräume und aktive Förderung einer inklusiven Unternehmenskultur - u. a. durch unsere Diversity & Inclusion Mitarbeiter:innen-Netzwerke

description_full:
About Us

HBX Group is a global technology‑driven travel organisation, connecting and empowering the world of travel through innovative solutions. We combine technology, data, and exceptional talent to deliver value to partners worldwide, always operating with a global approach, local touch mindset.




Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly analytical and detail‑oriented Strategy Analyst to support the Strategic Performance Lead and the Head of Strategic Performance. This role is critical in helping develop and maintain internal factbases, monitor progress of key strategic initiatives (“Big Bets”), and deliver high‑quality reporting and insights for senior leadership. The Analyst plays a key enabling role in the function, ensuring clarity, accuracy, and alignment across all strategic performance activities.




Responsibilities:

Support the Strategic Performance Lead in preparing materials and analysis for the weekly Big Bets forum and other executive‑level meetings.
Build and maintain internal factbases by gathering, validating, and synthesising data from multiple sources.
Conduct performance tracking for all Big Bets, monitoring progress, risks, blockers, and mitigation plans.
Prepare reports, dashboards, and presentations for senior management, ensuring clarity, accuracy, and alignment with strategic priorities.
Assist in the implementation and sharing of best practices across the function and with other teams.
Coordinate with cross‑functional teams (e.g., Finance, Transformation, Strategy Business Partners) to gather input and ensure alignment.
Support ad‑hoc deep dives, strategic reviews, and special projects as requested by the Strategic Performance Lead or Head of Strategic Performance.




Skillset

Strong analytical, problem‑solving, and data interpretation skills.
Experience preparing reports, dashboards, and presentations for senior leadership.
Ability to work with large datasets, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and quality.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to synthesise complex information clearly.
Strong collaboration skills and experience working cross‑functionally.
Highly organised, detail‑oriented, and able to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously.
Proactive mindset, with the ability to support strategic initiatives and adapt to evolving priorities.
Experience in strategy, business performance, transformation, or a similar analytical role is an advantage.




Experience Required

1–3 years of experience in strategy, business analysis, project management, or a similar analytical role (internships included).
Experience in data analysis, research, or project support is highly valued.
Exposure to working in a global or matrixed organization is a plus.




At HBX Group, we believe that diversity drives innovation and makes travel a force for good.

We're committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and respected, embracing different backgrounds, perspectives, and talents. Join us and be part of a team where diversity and equal opportunities really do make a difference

description_full:
Remobile is looking for a data-driven and creative Media Buyer to join our performance marketing team. In this role, you will own paid media campaigns across Meta and Google platforms — from strategy and setup to optimisation and reporting. You will work closely with creative, analytics, and client teams to drive measurable results and maximise return on ad spend.

This is a hands-on role for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, loves testing, and is obsessed with performance metrics.




Key Responsibilities




Plan, launch, and manage paid media campaigns across Meta (Facebook & Instagram) and Google (Search, Display, Shopping, YouTube, Performance Max)
Define and implement audience targeting strategies including custom audiences, lookalikes, retargeting, and in-market segments
Own campaign structure, ad set architecture, bidding strategies, and budget allocation to hit ROAS, CPA, and CPL targets
Conduct rigorous A/B testing on creatives, copy, audiences, landing pages, and bidding strategies
Monitor campaign performance daily; identify trends, opportunities, and anomalies and act swiftly
Produce weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable insights and clear recommendations
Collaborate with the creative team to brief, iterate, and test ad creatives aligned with campaign objectives
Manage monthly ad spends ranging from $5,000 to $500,000+ with full accountability for results
Stay ahead of platform updates, algorithm changes, and industry best practices
Coordinate with the analytics team on pixel implementation, conversion tracking, and attribution modelling




Requirements




Must-Have

2–5 years of hands-on experience managing paid campaigns on Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads
Proven track record of delivering results against KPIs such as ROAS, CPA, CTR, and conversion rate
Deep understanding of Meta campaign objectives, ad formats, pixel events, and Advantage+ features
Solid experience with Google Search, Shopping, Display, YouTube, and Performance Max campaigns
Proficiency with Google Analytics 4 and Meta Ads reporting tools
Strong analytical skills — comfortable working with large datasets and drawing meaningful conclusions
Experience with A/B testing frameworks and conversion rate optimisation principles
Excellent written communication skills for reporting and stakeholder updates




Nice-to-Have

Meta Blueprint Certification or Google Ads Certification
Experience with TikTok Ads, Snapchat, or LinkedIn Ads
Familiarity with third-party tools such as Triple Whale, Northbeam, or Supermetrics
Basic understanding of SEO and organic social to inform paid strategy
Experience working in an agency environment managing multiple client accounts




What We Offer




Competitive base salary with performance-based bonuses
Flexible working hours and hybrid / remote working model
Access to significant ad budgets and high-growth accounts
Regular upskilling budget for courses, certifications, and tools
Collaborative, transparent team culture with clear growth path
Direct exposure to senior strategy and leadership




How to Apply




Send your CV and a brief cover note (no more than 200 words) outlining your most impactful campaign result to shazhashim@remobile786.pl




Please include your Google Ads and / or Meta Ads Manager account-level spend history in your application. Applications without this information may not be reviewed.

description_full:
Founded in 2017, refurbed is Europe’s fastest-growing marketplace for refurbished products, active in 12 European countries and having surpassed €2Bn in GMV — all while being profitable. With beautiful headquarters in Vienna, we operate as a remote-first company, and our 250+ employees enjoy up to two months of workation per year. We’ve also been recognised as a Top DACH Employer by Kununu for three consecutive years.




Our mission is to make sustainable consumption the easy choice by enabling customers to buy products up to 40% cheaper while significantly reducing CO₂ emissions.




If you thrive in an environment that values momentum, ownership, and impact, you’ll feel at home here. We’re a fast-paced, high-performance team that works hard and challenges itself everyday. To enable this high-performance every team member enjoys full autonomy over their location (we’re remote-first).




The Category and Sales Marketing Analyst will play a crucial role in supporting vouchers and promotion operations, multi-category growth, improving supply-demand alignment, and strengthening the commercial foundations needed for successful marketing strategies across multiple categories, markets, and performance channels.




This role will directly enable Refurbed’s expansion across categories, brands and countries by taking ownership of operational and analytical tasks.




You will work closely with Demand Planning, Category Managers, CRM, Performance Marketing (Search/Shopping, Paid Social, Affiliates), Product, and Commercial teams.




WHO YOU ARE
2–5 years experience in e-commerce, category management, marketing operations, performance marketing, or commercial strategy.
Strong analytical and data-handling skills; able to create clear insights from complex data.
Highly organized, reliable, and operationally strong.
Comfortable coordinating with multiple teams and managing parallel workstreams across categories, markets, and performance channels.
Proactive mindset with strong problem-solving skills.
Experience with consumer electronics / SDA is a plus.
Experience with promotions or marketplace operations preferred.
Bonus: performance marketing fundamentals (e.g., Search/Shopping, Paid Social, Affiliates)




Location & eligibility: This role is open to candidates based in Europe (including UK) only with a valid right to work.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

You drive multi-category growth. You support prioritization and budget allocation across categories and markets, turning demand-side insights (search, click data, pricing signals) into clear, actionable growth opportunities and structured recommendations.
You run promotions end-to-end. You execute voucher campaigns across markets, monitor performance and ROI, and continuously optimize based on supply relevance, cost efficiency, and commercial impact.
You connect Marketing and Supply. You align teams by consolidating forecasts, stock, pricing, and partner inputs, ensuring everyone works off the same priorities and timelines while contributing clear insights to business reviews.
You enable brands and partners. You maintain key KPIs, ensure data readiness for activation, and support smooth rollout of brand campaigns.
You scale how we work. You build tools, dashboards, and documentation that enable teams to be more self-serve, while identifying automation opportunities to reduce manual effort.
You support performance execution. You help translate category priorities into performance marketing channels (Search, Paid Social, Affiliates) and ensure campaigns are set up for success.




WHY YOU WILL ENJOY WORKING WITH US:

Our Culture and Values:

Decisions should be made based on facts and not by hierarchy levels? We sure think so!
We embrace giving and receiving feedback, testing and welcoming new ideas, as well as sharing our knowledge across the company.
You fail sometimes? Well, so do we! We’re all just human, let’s learn from our mistakes to improve in the future!
No matter who you love, where you’re from, who you pray to, whether you pee sitting down or standing up – we are a bunch of talented people who enjoy spending our time making a difference!

Personal & Professional Development:

You'll have access to a dedicated learning budget within your department to support your growth, whether it's courses, conferences, or other learning opportunities that matter to you.
We partner with Likeminded, offering you private sessions with experts for your personal growth and mental health.
We frequently host internal workshops, allowing our teams to further develop their skills in different areas and enhancing collaboration across departments.

Flexibility:

We care about a healthy work/life balance. We not only function and support a fully remote setting but also offer the possibility to work from our beautiful office in the vibrant heart of Vienna – we love dogs, so feel free to bring your furry little buddy too 😊
We trust you to do the best job, so we don't care so much when you do it – you are able to self-organize.
You will also be invited to take part in our office weeks, happening three times a year, where you will have the chance to work side by side with your colleagues and enjoy the team-building events and on-site workshops




…and much more! See https://careers.refurbed.com/ for further insights!

description_full:
Du willst keine 30k-Accounts mehr babysitten? Gut.




Werde Teil des Teams einer der schnellsten wachsenden Paid-Ads-Agenturen im DACH-Raum!




MoonJet ist eine dynamische Marketingagentur mit Sitz im Herzen Hamburgs, die sich auf Paid Ads und Ad Creatives im eCommerce-Bereich spezialisiert. Wir skalieren die Umsätze unserer Partner auf neue Flughöhen.




Skaliere spannende Online-Shops von Höhle der Löwen-Start-Ups bis hin zu internationalen Großkonzernen und erschaffe gemeinsam mit uns Scaling Case Studies, die deutschlandweit Wellen schlagen.




Deine Aufgaben:

Kampagnenmanagement und Beratung: Verantwortung für die Betreuung und Beratung unserer Kunden während des gesamten Kampagnenprozesses – von der Konzeption über die Optimierung bis hin zur Auswertung.
Full-Stack Media Buying: Verantwortung über sämtliche Kunden-Accounts. Primär auf Google Ads, sekundär Meta Ads, tertiär TikTok- und Pinterest Ads.
Tägliche Skalierung der Kampagnen: Kontinuierliche Analyse der Kampagnen-Performance-Daten und Ableitung geeigneter Maßnahmen zur Steigerung der Kampagnenleistung.
Datengetriebene Analyse der Creatives: Analyse der Creative-Hypothesen des Creative Strategists und Bereitstellung von datenbasiertem Feedback zur kontinuierlichen Verbesserung der Creatives-Strategie.
Strategieentwicklung und Umsetzung: Entwicklung und Implementierung holistischer, Full-Funnel Kampagnenstrukturen - speziell für Meta Ads.
Attributionsanalyse und Budgetallokation: Auswertung der Attribution und entsprechende Budgetallokation durch Nutzung von Analyse-Tools wie Triple Whale, HYROS oder Tracify.
Optimierung des Trackings und der Product Feeds: Sicherstellung der optimalen Nutzung der Tracking Pixels und des Product Feeds für optimale Auslieferung.
Teamwork mit unserem A-Player Team: Enge Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen internen Abteilungen, Brainstorming, sowie Projektleitung für facettenreiche Aufgaben.




Dein Profil:

Media Buying Champion: Berufserfahrung als Media Buyer wünschenswert
Full-Stack mit Meta Schwerpunkt: Absoluter Experte bei Google Ads, aber auch grundlegende Erfahrungen mit Meta Ads (für TikTok und Pinterest Ads sind keine Vorkenntnisse notwendig).
Affinität mit Zahlen: Fähigkeit zur Entwicklung und Implementierung einer effektiven Budget-Allokation über die Kanäle und Kampagnen hinweg.
Analyse- und Optimierungsfähigkeiten: Ausgeprägte Fähigkeiten zur Analyse von Performance-Daten und Optimierung von Kampagnen.
Grundlegendes Verständnis über Attribution: Idealerweise bereits Erfahrung mit 3rd Party Tracking Tools, wie z.B. Triple Whale, HYROS oder Tracify gesammelt.
Kommunikationsstärke: Hervorragende Kommunikations- und Präsentationsfähigkeiten.
Teamfähigkeit und Eigenverantwortung: Hohe Eigenverantwortung, Organisations- und Teamfähigkeit.
Sprachkenntnisse: Fließende Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift.




Was wir Dir bieten:

Werde Teil einer der schnellstwachsenden Marketingagentur im DACH-Raum.
Arbeite an spannenden Projekten mit namhaften, national bekannten Kunden.
Gestalte Deine Karriere in einem flachen Hierarchie-Modell mit offener, familiären Unternehmenskultur.
Profitiere von Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten und attraktiven Benefits.
Werde direkt gecoacht von Industry-Leading Mentoren und der Geschäftsführung.
Flexible Arbeitszeiten durch Gleitzeit und Home-Office.
30 Tage Urlaub pro Jahr.

MoonJet ist ein Meta- & Google-Partner und unser Gründer wurde als LinkedIn Top-Voice für Marketing ausgezeichnet. Wir betreuen Kunden von Höhle der Löwen-Start-Ups bis hin zu bekannten Großkonzernen und verfügen über knapp 10 Jahre Erfahrung in der Branche.

description_full:
Company Overview

Holafly is a high-growth scale-up revolutionising how businesses and travellers connect to the internet abroad. Since 2018, we’ve empowered travellers in over 200 destinations worldwide with secure and reliable eSIM solutions. With a team of 500+ professionals across multiple countries, we are scaling globally to support travellers with seamless, unlimited data connectivity.

We’re not just connecting people—we’re enabling freedom and peace of mind, ensuring our users stay connected from the second they land, wherever their journey takes them.

The Role

As the International Growth & Strategy Manager, you will be the strategic engine behind our global market expansion across 200+ countries. Your insights and playbooks will directly accelerate international revenue and defend Holafly's market leadership worldwide.

Key Responsibilities


Design and own the global GTM strategy and market prioritization frameworks from scratch.
Build analytical models for market sizing, resource allocation, and competitive intelligence.
Define tailored entry strategies covering positioning, pricing, and channel mix for new regions.
Collaborate cross-functionally with Product and Marketing to drive localization and brand consistency.
Lead strategic reviews with local teams to remove growth blockers and realign execution priorities.
Present high-impact recommendations directly to senior leadership to guide global investment decisions.


Qualifications


5+ years of experience in international expansion, GTM strategy, or top-tier strategy consulting.
Proven track record launching and scaling digital consumer products across multiple global geographies.
Advanced analytical skills with experience building bottom-up market sizing and prioritization models.
Strong cross-functional leadership skills to influence Product, Marketing, and local teams without direct authority.
Full professional fluency in English.


Nice to Have


Experience in the travel-tech, eSIM, or telecom sectors.
Familiarity with industry data tools like IATA, Euromonitor, or Looker Studio.
Background in building local strategic partnerships to accelerate market entry.


Benefits & Perks


100% Remote flexibility to work from anywhere in the world.
Generous paid time off to ensure you can relax, travel, and recharge.
Annual education bonus to fund your continuous professional growth.
Thriving international culture with highly-skilled teammates from 60+ countries.


During a trip to Thailand, Pedro and Lidia, the founders of Holafly, experienced the frustration of not having an internet connection.

Inspired by their own experiences, they came up with a simple but brilliant idea: why not allow travellers to buy data plans for any destination from their home country?

Our passion for providing easy and convenient connectivity to travellers around the world drives everything we do.

We love our work and we do it with pride. Stay connected wherever you go.

Founded in Hamburg in 2007, we have quickly grown into a global company with offices in major cities such as London, New York, Berlin and Tokyo. And we still have a lot of plans. Your Team

At Statista R, our team of over 130 analysts and sales specialists creates, publishes and distributes globally renowned company and brand toplists as well as rankings for a wide range of industries. As experts in rating companies, brands and products, we use our independent market research and data analysis expertise to identify the best in their respective industries, creating transparency and trust. Contribute to multifaceted international media cooperation projects
Analyze e-commerce companies and online platforms, including their business models and performance metrics
Research and analyze internal and external primary and secondary data to assess company performance and develop rankings

Collaborate with the team to develop the best approaches for our projects

Strong interest in e-commerce markets, digital platforms and online business models
First practical experience in marketing, outreach or campaign management (e.g. internships, student jobs or early professional experience)

Very good knowledge of Excel and PowerPoint; experience with data tools or programming (e.g. Python, R or SQL) is a plus

Work from abroad up to 30 calendar days a year

About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

The Performance Marketing Team of Agoda is a world leader in online marketing. This department is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers through measurable marketing programs and channels. The team is a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists, and data scientists in the world. The marketing leadership at Agoda have deep experience in data science, product, strategy, and other marketing fields and have built an organization that thrives on data, creative ideas, and technology. The Performance Marketing Team also fosters a great learning environment. You will be able to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a variety of backgrounds from all over the world.

In this Role, you’ll get to:


Search: Experiment with text ads, bidding, and campaign structures on Google, Bing, Baidu, Naver, and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
Display: Test, analyze, and optimize campaigns on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and others.
Modeling: Analyze the vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop models we can use for optimization, and build dashboards for account managers.

Bachelor’s Degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, engineering, or science)
Ability to communicate fluently in English
2+ years’ experience in top-tier management consulting, investment banking, private equity, or strategy/business operations for a fast-growing globally operating tech company
Exposure to one or more data analysis packages or databases, e.g., SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL
Good numerical reasoning skills
Proficiency in Excel
Intellectual curiosity


It’s Great if you Have:


Experience in digital marketing
Academic research experience

description_full:
Organization- Shared Service Center - Mainz

Summary

Who We Are

At Hyatt, we believe in the power of belonging and creating a culture of care, where our colleagues become family. Since 1957, our colleagues and our guests have been at the heart of our business and helped Hyatt become one of the best, and fastest growing hospitality brands in the world. Our transformative growth and the addition of new hotels, brands and business lines can open the door for exciting career and growth opportunities to our colleagues.

As we continue to grow, we never lose sight of what’s most important: People. We turn trips into journeys, encounters into experiences and jobs into careers.

Your Role

The Business Systems Analyst – Finance Technology supports and enhances finance business processes by owning, supporting, and continuously improving Alteryx workflows and related financial systems. The role sits within Finance Technology and works closely with business and IT stakeholders to ensure stable, efficient, and well‑governed analytics and automation solutions. This position plays a key role in operational support, workflow development, governance, and process optimization, ensuring business continuity, data integrity, and long‑term system maintainability across Finance Technology platforms.

Your Responsibilities


System & Operational Support
Own and continuously improve support processes for Alteryx and interconnected finance and IT systems.
Provide daily operational support for Alteryx workflows running on the server, including monitoring execution, performance, inputs, and outputs to ensure business process continuity.
Ensure all published workflows are supportable, well documented, and compliant with adopted standards.
Provide ongoing support and guidance to internal Alteryx business users and community members.
Workflow Development & Enhancement
Participate in the design, development, testing, and deployment of new Alteryx workflows.
Deliver minor enhancements and optimizations to existing workflows based on business feedback and support findings.
Conduct performance analysis of individual workflows to improve stability, efficiency, and scalability.
Governance & Best Practices
Establish, maintain, and promote Alteryx best practices to support long‑term sustainability and supportability.
Participate in workflow review governance to ensure compliance with development standards before production deployment.
Actively promote governance principles and development standards across the internal Alteryx community to drive adoption and consistency.
Process Optimization & Automation
Identify opportunities to eliminate repetitive activities through automation and the use of efficiency tools and platforms such as ServiceNow, DataDog, and Rundeck.
Simplify processes and support activities where full automation is not yet achievable, minimizing manual effort.
Proactively identify potential process risks or failures and recommend preventive solutions.
Documentation & Knowledge Management
Maintain high‑quality documentation for workflows, processes, and support activities.
Ensure documentation supports effective teamwork, knowledge transfer, task delegation, and user guidance.
Collaboration & Values
Partner closely with finance business teams and IT stakeholders to align solutions with business needs.
Demonstrate a strong commitment to Hyatt’s core values in all interactions and deliverables.
Perform additional related duties as assigned to support team and organizational objectives.

Your Qualifications & Experience


Experience
Experience partnering closely with business teams to support and improve finance processes.
Hands‑on experience supporting IT systems and improving finance business processes.
Familiarity with financial systems and related business concepts.
Experience working with analytics, automation, or workflow‑based tools in a support or development capacity.
Education

description_full:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to know our team:

The Marketing team at Agoda is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale, measurable marketing programs designed to improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers. The team combines a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists and data scientists, collectively building a team that thrives on data, creative ideas and technology. . The Marketing leadership fosters a great learning environment, providing the opportunity to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a diverse variety of backgrounds from across the globe.

Due to continued expansion, there are multiple analyst roles within the marketing team across different marketing channels. While the scope will vary depending on these channels, here are some examples:


Experimentation and optimizing campaign performance: Experiment with ads/campaign structures and bidding& pricing strategies on partners such as Google, Bing, Tripadvisor, Trivago and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
Modeling: Analyze vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop predictive models using data science techniques (eg. understanding impact on bookings from large scale TV campaigns or demand elasticity from pricing optimization) and liaise with product teams on implementation roadmap
Reporting, analysis and insights: Building dashboards to track performance, derive insights, understand growth levers and communicate recommendations via presentations to stakeholders


What you’ll Need to Succeed:


Bachelor’s degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, engineering business or science)
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English
2+ years experience in data crunching from top-tier consulting, investment banking, private equity or strategy/business for a fast-growing globaltech company
Experience in one or more data analysis packages or databases, eg., SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL and visualization tools, eg. Tableau, Power BI
Ability to move fast and be efficient, making decisions on objective evidence rather than subjective gut feel
Innate desire to take ownership, make an impact and influence outcomes
Excellent organizational skills, attention to detail and ability to work independently


It’s great if you have:


Experience in digital marketing or ecommerce
Experience with A/B testing and other testing metrics
Strong presentation and negotiation skills
Skills that foster collaboration and team spirit

description_full:
Vollgas nicht nur auf der Straße – sondern auch mit uns im Job!

Die Stellantis Germany GmbH ist Teil des weltweiten Automobilkonzerns Stellantis N.V.

In Deutschland ist die Stellantis Germany GmbH aus den beiden Unternehmensteilen

FCA Germany GmbH und Groupe PSA Deutschland GmbH hervorgegangen. Unter dem Dach von Stellantis werden die Marken Abarth, Alfa Romeo, Citroën, DS Automobiles, Fiat, Fiat Professional (leichte Nutzfahrzeuge), Jeep®, Leapmotor, Opel und Peugeot vertrieben.




Der Market Funnel Analyst (m/w/d) unterstützt die tägliche Umsetzung des Monitorings, der Diagnose und der Optimierung der Funnel-Performance.

Die Rolle nutzt regionale Dashboards, KPIs und Measurement-Frameworks und wendet zugleich marktspezifisches Know-how an, um Daten korrekt zu interpretieren und umsetzbare Optimierungsmaßnahmen zu empfehlen.

Diese Rolle stellt sicher, dass das regionale Reporting im Markt konsistent genutzt wird, und reichert es durch lokale Insights, Nuancen und Performance-Learnings an.




1. Funnel-Monitoring mit regionalen Dashboards

Performance über alle Funnel-Stufen hinweg mithilfe regionaler Tools tracken.
Anomalien, Trends, Wachstumschancen und Drop-offs identifizieren.
Performance anhand lokaler Channel-, Campaign- und Zielgruppen-Insights kontextualisieren.




2. Insight-Entwicklung für lokale Governance & regionale Abstimmung

Funnel-Insight-Summaries für Markt-Performance-Routinen vorbereiten.
Klare, kontextualisierte Erklärungen zu KPI-Bewegungen liefern.
Lokale Insights zu regionalen Reports und Playbooks beitragen.




3. Umsetzung von Optimierungen

Die Implementierung von Optimierungsmaßnahmen über Media, CRM und Content hinweg unterstützen.
A/B-Tests gemäß regionalen Frameworks durchführen, angepasst an Marktspezifika.
Test-Performance tracken und Learnings dokumentieren.




4. Reporting-Disziplin & Datenqualität

Sicherstellen, dass der Markt auf regionale Dashboards setzt (kein Parallel-Reporting).
Datenqualität validieren und Issues an regionale und lokale Owner eskalieren.
Konsistente Anwendung regionaler KPI-Definitionen sicherstellen.




5. Zusammenarbeit & Support

Eng mit CRM-, Media-, Market- und Brand-Teams zusammenarbeiten, damit Funnel-KPIs Ausführungsentscheidungen steuern.
Vorbereitung von Markt- und regionalen Performance-Reviews unterstützen.
Bei KPI-Schwankungen Deep-Dive-Diagnosen bereitstellen.




Unterstützte zentrale Funnel-KPIs

Awareness: Reichweite, CPR, Traffic-Qualität
Consideration: CTR, Engagement, Lead-Volumen, CPL
Intent & Conversion: Lead-to-Sale-Conversion, CPA
Retention: Loyalty-Rate, CRM-Lifecycle-KPIs
Effizienz: Effizienz der Budgetallokation
Forecasting: Prognosegenauigkeit (Demand/Leads/Sales)




Skills & Kompetenzen

Ausgeprägte analytische Fähigkeiten und hohe Detailgenauigkeit
Fähigkeit, Funnel-KPIs und Performance-Signale zu interpretieren
Sicherer Umgang mit Analytics-Plattformen (PowerBI, GA4, CRM-Tools)
Klare Kommunikation und Storytelling
Sicheres Arbeiten in strukturierten Frameworks
Problemlösungsorientiertes Mindset




Erfahrung

1–4 Jahre Erfahrung in Digital Analytics, Media Performance, CRM-Analytics oder Marketing Operations
Vorherige Erfahrung mit Funnel-KPIs wünschenswert
Erfahrung im Umgang mit standardisierten Reporting-Umgebungen

Sie erwartet eine attraktive und herausfordernde Tätigkeit eines dynamischen und internationalen Automobilkonzerns. Bei der Aktion Mensch erhebst und analysierst du nicht nur Daten – du bewegst mit deinen Erkenntnissen etwas wirklich Sinnvolles. Du erkennst, was hinter Zahlen steckt, machst deren Business-Relevanz sichtbar und legst damit die Grundlage für strategische Entscheidungen mit echter Wirkung.




Tu, was du liebst

Im dreiköpfigen Team, das eine Stabsstelle beim Vorstand ist, bist du als Senior-Expert*in dafür verantwortlich, zu analysieren, welche Projekte Inklusion tatsächlich verbessern, wie erfolgreich Lotteriekampagnen sind und wo Förderung die größte Wirkung entfaltet – und leitest daraus gezielt Maßnahmen für maximale gesellschaftliche Wirkung ab.




Du erkennst die strategische Relevanz von Marktdaten und Insights, übersetzt diese in belastbare, entscheidungsrelevante Empfehlungen und lieferst damit die Grundlage für eine wirkungsvolle Markt- und Markenstrategie.
Du verantwortest die End-to-End-Konzeption, Planung und Steuerung anspruchsvoller Marktforschungsprojekte entlang zentraler Business-Fragestellungen – von Marke, Kommunikation und Kampagnen bis hin zu Förderung, Pricing und Produkt.
Als zentrale Ansprechperson und Sparringspartner*in berätst du interne Stakeholder auf allen Ebenen (u. a. Lotterie, Förderung, Kampagne, Kommunikation) zu marktforschungsrelevanten Fragestellungen und entwickelst passgenaue, methodisch fundierte Studiendesigns–von pragmatischen Set-ups bis hin zu komplexen, multimethodalen Ansätzen.
Du analysierst Primär- und Sekundärdaten mit hoher methodischer Sicherheit, identifizierst zentrale Treiber und Muster und übersetzt diese in klare, entscheidungsrelevante Handlungsempfehlungen.
Du bereitest Insights zielgruppenspezifisch auf und sorgst für maximale Wirkung – in Management-Präsentationen, Workshops sowie in strukturierten Reporting-Formaten.
Du priorisierst Projekte entlang strategischer Relevanz, triffst fundierte methodische Entscheidungen und stellst eine hohe Qualität, Effizienz und Termintreue in der Umsetzung sicher.
Die unternehmensweiten Marktforschungsstandards entwickelst du weiter, etablierst eine zukunftsfähige Forschungsarchitektur und treibst deren Umsetzung voran.
Du dentifizierst relevante Markt- und Methoden-Trends, evaluierstinnovative Ansätze und initiierst Pilotprojekte– insbesondere im Hinblick auf den Einsatzneuer Technologien wie KI in der Marktforschung.
Du steuerst Marktforschungsinstitute und Dienstleister, verantwortest Budgets und stellst Transparenz sowie Controlling sicher.
Du gibstjuniorigenKolleg*innen fachliche Orientierung und arbeitest eng mit interdisziplinären Teams zusammen.

Tech Stack: Zeotap Customer Data Platform, Holistics BI, Google Analytics 4, Tealium iQ, EasyFeedback, GetFeedback, SPSS




Zeig, was du kannst

Deine Leidenschaft ist die Marktforschung und du bringst mehrjährige (ca.4–6+Jahre) fundierte Erfahrung in der betrieblichen Marktforschung, im Insights-Umfeld oder auf Agenturseite mit und verstehst es, Forschung konsequent an Business- und Wirkungszielen auszurichten.
Du verfügst über ein sehr breites und tiefes Methodenverständnis – sowohl im quantitativen als auch im qualitativen Bereich – und wählst je nach Fragestellung souverän den passenden methodischen Ansatz.
Du hast nachweislich Erfahrung in der Steuerung komplexer Marktforschungsprojekte – inklusive Budgetverantwortung, Dienstleistersteuerung und Qualitätssicherung.
Du überzeugst durch ausgeprägte analytische Stärke und die Fähigkeit, Daten in fundierte, strategisch relevante Handlungsempfehlungen zu übersetzen.
Du agierst sicher auf Augenhöhe mit unterschiedlichen Stakeholdern und bringst ausgeprägte Beratungs-, Moderations- und Kommunikationskompetenz mit.
Du verfolgst aktiv neue Entwicklungen in Marktforschung, Methoden und Technologien (z. B. datengetriebene Ansätze, Automatisierung, KI) und hast Freude daran, diese konzeptionell weiterzudenken und einzusetzen.
Du arbeitest strukturiert, eigenverantwortlich und priorisierst souverän in einem dynamischen, anspruchsvollen Umfeld.
Du hast ein abgeschlossenes Hochschulstudium, z. B. in Marktforschung, Wirtschaft‑oder Sozialwissenschaften, Psychologie, Marketing oder einem vergleichbaren Studiengang.




Unser Erfolgsrezept: Das WIR gewinnt

Ein Job, in dem man mit viel Spaß und freier Zeiteinteilung Gutes tun kann. Gleitzeit oder mobiles Arbeiten unterstützen dabei, Beruf und Privatleben zu vereinbaren (60 %mobiles Arbeitund 40 % Büropräsenz).
Persönliche und fachliche Weiterentwicklung durch individuelle Fortbildungen, Coaching, Leadership-Programme, Masterplan und Entwicklungspläne.
Positives, offenes und freundliches Arbeitsumfeld. Wertschätzende❤️-Atmosphäre, klare Führung und die Möglichkeit, aus Fehlern zu lernen, sind selbstverständlich sowie ein nachhaltiges Arbeitsumfeld.
Eine moderne IT-Ausstattung, barrierefreie Arbeitsplätze, technische Hilfen, ein Leitsystem gehören ganz selbstverständlich dazu und ermöglichen ein entspanntes, professionelles Arbeiten. Assistenzen und Assistenzhunde sind ebenso selbstverständlich willkommen und Teil unseres täglichen Miteinanders.
Attraktives Gehalt,6,7 % Erfolgsbeteiligung (vom Jahresbruttogehalt), kostenfreies Deutschlandticket, umfangreiche Sozialleistungen (zusätzliches Kindergeld, betriebliche Altervorsorge etc.)
Urban Sports Mitgliedschaft, kostenloser PKW & Fahrrad-Parkplatz in unserer Tiefgarage, kostenloser Fahrradverleih, Fahrgemeinschaften.
29 Urlaubstage (plus: Rosenmontag, Heiligabend, Silvester)
Schau bei Kununu: Aktion Mensch e.V. als Arbeitgeber

Über uns

Inklusion ist unser Herzensanliegen. Als größte private Förderorganisation begeistern wir die Menschen für eine Gesellschaft, in der Unterschiede normal sind. Auch in unserem Unternehmen leben wir Vielfalt. Mit 280 Kolleg*innen arbeiten wir jeden Tag daran, dass Menschen mit und ohne Behinderung selbstverständlich zusammenleben können. Bewerbungen von Menschen mit Behinderung sind bei uns willkommen! Du möchtest dabei sein und gemeinsam mit uns die Welt von morgen gestalten?

description_full:
Wir suchen für unser Team in München oder Berlin eine Junior Research & Insights Manager (w/m/d) befristet auf 18 Monate.

Wir sind eine globale, socially-led Creative Agency mit über 1.300 Mitarbeitenden in 17 Büros weltweit. In einer Welt, in der Social Media Kultur prägt, helfen wir Marken dabei, Ideen zu entwickeln, über die Menschen sprechen.

Wir verstehen Online-Communities, Kulturen und Subkulturen über die gesamte Social-Landschaft hinweg. Zu unseren Kund:innen in Deutschland zählen unter anderem AUDI AG, Mercedes-Benz Trucks und Müller. We Are Social ist Teil der Plus Company.

Als Junior Research & Insights Manager (w/m/d) unterstützt du unser Intelligence Team bei unterschiedlichen Kund:innenprojekten und arbeitest eng mit erfahrenen Kolleg:innen aus Research, Strategie und Data zusammen. Dabei lernst du Schritt für Schritt, wie datenbasierte Insights entstehen und wie sie kreative und strategische Entscheidungen unterstützen.

Requirements

Deine Aufgaben:


Unterstützung bei der Recherche und Analyse von Social-Media-, Markt- und Zielgruppendaten
Mitarbeit bei der Erstellung von Reports, Präsentationen und Benchmark-Analysen
Unterstützung bei der Pflege und Aktualisierung von Dashboards
Aufbereitung und Visualisierung von Daten und Erkenntnissen für interne und externe Präsentationen
Beobachtung von digitalen Trends, Plattformen und kulturellen Entwicklungen
Unterstützung bei der Analyse von Creator- und Influencer-Aktivitäten
Zusammenarbeit mit dem Strategy-, Research- und Data-Team bei unterschiedlichen Kund:innenprojekten
Schrittweises Lernen und Verstehen von KPI-Analysen, Insight-Entwicklung und datenbasierter Strategiearbeit


Wonach suchen wir?


Erste praktische Erfahrung im Agentur-, Marketing-, Research- oder Social-Media-Umfeld
Großes Interesse an Social Media, digitalen Trends und Online-Kultur
Interesse an Daten, Kommunikation, Insights und Konsumentenverhalten
Motivation, neue Tools und Plattformen schnell zu lernen
Strukturierte, zuverlässige und eigenständige Arbeitsweise
Kommunikationsstärke und Spaß an Teamarbeit
Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift


Benefits

Warum du Teil unseres Teams werden solltest?

Lebendiger Teamgeist: Wir tragen das Adjektiv social sehr bewusst im Namen und leben einen starken Teamgeist und eine offene Unternehmenskultur mit flachen Hierarchien, in denen deine Stimme zählt!

Spannende Projekte mit internationaler Reichweite: Wir arbeiten an digitalen Projekten, die Maßstäbe setzen! Unsere Kund:innen kommen aus dem B2C- und B2B-Umfeld und sind sowohl lokale als auch internationale Player.

Global verbunden und lokal verwurzelt: Unsere Teams an den Standorten München und Kreuzberg profitieren von einem nachhaltigen Wissensaustausch mit den WAS Standorten weltweit und sind im Glockenbachviertel und Kreuzberg zu Hause.

Flexibilität - Yes please!: Hybrides Arbeiten vereint für uns die Vorteile des Home Offices mit denen des Arbeitens im Büro. Genau deswegen haben wir uns für einen 2/3 Split entschieden, der bedeutet, dass wir bei 40h mindestens 2 Tage vor Ort mit unseren Kolleg:innen und 3 Tage im Home Office arbeiten. But that's not all! Darüber hinaus sind wir große Fans von Remote Arbeit. Deswegen hast du bei uns die Möglichkeit 20 Tage innerhalb Deutschlands und weitere 20 Tage innerhalb Europas remote zu arbeiten. Wenn du also kein großer Fan des Deutschen Winters bist, join us und du kannst diese Zeit in Portugal oder Griechenland genießen.

Mehr Benefits für dich: Weil wir wissen, wie wichtig Well-being ist und wir Benefits einfach lieben, bieten wir dir mehr als nur den Standard. Genieße 2 zusätzliche Health Days, Menstrual Leave, einen freien Tag an deinem Geburtstag, eine Kooperation mit Wellpass, das Deutschlandticket, eine Mitgliedschaft bei OpenUp und vieles mehr.

Both ways you will build up significant knowledge and have a direct impact on business decisions.



AUTO1 Group is Europe’s leading digital automotive platform. We revolutionize the used car market with our well-known brands Autohero, wirkaufendeinauto.de and AUTO1.com







What we offer



Remote options in Germany up to 5 days/week
Our dynamic startup environment offers new challenges for personal growth with the contribution of own ideas.
We invest in your personal and professional growth with a dedicated education budget for online courses, conferences and trainings.
We offer discounts on well-known brands like Flaconi, Bosch, Apple and Sky, as well as special offers on used cars for you, your family and your friends.


Job Description


Take full ownership of planning, executing, and optimizing campaigns across Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, and Meta platforms.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams—including Design, Marketing Automation, Marketing Controlling, and Video Production—on campaign planning, creative assets, reporting, automation, and optimization.


Qualifications

Please submit your CV in English.

description_full:
Vollgas nicht nur auf der Straße – sondern auch mit uns im Job!

Die Stellantis Germany GmbH ist Teil des weltweiten Automobilkonzerns Stellantis N.V.

In Deutschland ist die Stellantis Germany GmbH aus den beiden Unternehmensteilen

FCA Germany GmbH und Groupe PSA Deutschland GmbH hervorgegangen. Unter dem Dach von Stellantis werden die Marken Abarth, Alfa Romeo, Citroën, DS Automobiles, Fiat, Fiat Professional (leichte Nutzfahrzeuge), Jeep®, Leapmotor, Opel und Peugeot vertrieben.




Der/die Market Funnel Performance Manager:in verantwortet die Full-Funnel-Performance im jeweiligen Markt und stellt eine enge Verzahnung zwischen regionalen Standards und marktspezifischen Anforderungen sicher. Die Rolle aktiviert regionale Methodiken, Dashboards und KPIs und adaptiert die Umsetzung entlang des lokalen Konsumentenverhaltens, der Channel-Realität sowie der Business-Dynamik.

Sie/Er stellt sicher, dass Performance-Entscheidungen im Markt datengetrieben erfolgen – mit regionalem Reporting als primärem Framework, angereichert um kontextuelle lokale Insights.

Zudem speist die Rolle Markt-Learnings zurück, um regionale Playbooks, Benchmarks und zukünftige Guidelines weiterzuentwickeln.




Kernaufgaben

1. Full-Funnel-Ownership für den Markt

Steuert die Markt-Performance über alle Funnel-Stufen hinweg:
Awareness → Consideration → Intent → Conversion → Loyalty.
Übersetzt regionale Frameworks in marktrelevante Strategien.
Priorisiert Performance-Treiber basierend auf Markt-Insights, Wettbewerbsumfeld und Funnel-Diagnostik.




2. Alignment mit regionalen Standards & Tools

Implementiert regionale KPI-Definitionen, Methodiken, Dashboards und Governance-Prozesse.
Stellt sicher, dass der Markt regionale Test-Frameworks, Messstandards und Reporting-Zyklen konsequent anwendet.
Arbeitet mit regionalen Teams an der Weiterentwicklung von Benchmarks, Target-Setting und Methodik-Updates.




3. Markt-Insights als Input für regionale Teams

Liefert strukturierte Markt-Insights, Performance-Treiber, Test-Learnings und Business-Kontext.
Hebt marktspezifische Besonderheiten hervor, die Funnel-KPIs und Optimierungsansätze beeinflussen.
Gestaltet zukünftige regionale Guidelines durch Feedback aus der lokalen Umsetzung mit.




4. Funnel-Optimierung & cross-funktionale Steuerung

Leitet Funnel-Diagnostik und Maßnahmenpläne über Media, LFAs, CRM, Markt- und Brand-Teams hinweg.
Steuert Agenturen zur Optimierung von Creatives, Audiences, Customer Journeys und Conversion-Flows.
Treibt A/B-Testing im Einklang mit regionalen Protokollen – zugeschnitten auf lokale Kanäle.




5. Business-Governance & Reporting

Stellt sicher, dass regionale Dashboards als Single Source of Truth für Market Business Reviews genutzt werden.
Unterstützt Management-Entscheidungen durch KPI-Interpretation und lokalen Performance-Kontext.
Bereitet marktbezogene Insights für wöchentliche, monatliche und quartalsweise Performance-Reviews auf.




6. Budgetsteuerung & Forecasting

Wendet regionale Media-Forecasting-Modelle an – angereichert um lokale Marktindikatoren.
Überwacht Spend-Effizienz und empfiehlt Budget-Reallokationen entlang der Funnel-Stufen.
Treibt die Steigerung der Conversion-Effizienz.

description_full:
ZEAL Network SE is a dynamic, international group of companies that has been creating exciting and innovative lottery experiences for over 20 years. As Germany’s largest provider of online lotteries through our brands LOTTO24 and Tipp24, and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, the second-largest national lottery, we’re shaping the future of the lottery industry. We are passionate about driving innovation, as demonstrated by our newest brands, Freiheit+ and Traumhausverlosung, which bring fresh and exciting dreams to life. Additionally, through ZEAL Ventures, we invest in inspiring e-commerce start-ups like Omaze and DAYMADE, fueling fresh ideas and opportunities.

Our team of 350+ professionals from diverse backgrounds is united by a visionary mindset, a passion for collaboration, and a commitment to inspire dreams. At ZEAL, we empower our people to think ambitiously and work together toward a shared purpose: helping people imagine and achieve their aspirations.

The Role

As the Data Product Manager - Marketing Analytics (f/m/d), you will own the marketing analytics domain end to end. You are the senior voice on what gets built, why it matters, and in what order. You partner directly with marketing leadership to translate ambition into a clear, prioritised roadmap, and you lead the team that delivers it.

This is a domain ownership role, not a coordination role. You set direction, manage trade-offs, and represent the marketing analytics agenda in executive conversations. You treat the domain as a portfolio of data products with defined owners, users, success metrics, and lifecycles. You are accountable for outcomes, not activity.

You will also be the senior measurement authority for marketing performance at ZEAL, with hands-on credibility across MMM, attribution, and incrementality. You hold vendors accountable, build internal capability, and ensure decisions on marketing investment are grounded in defensible analytics.

Your Tasks


The marketing analytics roadmap as domain owner, including prioritisation, sequencing, trade-offs, and alignment with marketing leadership and broader ZEAL strategy.
Stakeholder communication across the marketing analytics agenda, translating business ambition into structured plans, managing expectations proactively, and saying no constructively when capacity or strategy requires it.
Day-to-day leadership of the marketing analytics team, including analysts, data scientists, analytics engineers, and data engineers working within the domain. You grow their capability and protect their focus.
Marketing measurement maturity across MMM, attribution, and incrementality. You own methodology decisions, design experiments and incrementality tests, evaluate vendors, and build internal capability rather than outsourcing it.
Partnership with marketing leadership on planning, investment decisions, performance reviews, and campaign analytics, ensuring data is in the room when decisions are made.
The data product mindset for your domain. You define products with clear owners, users, success metrics, and lifecycles, rather than treating analytics as a queue of requests.
Portfolio discipline across the domain, including scope, risk, dependencies, and transparency. You make it easy for executives to see what is happening and why.
Partnership with the Tech Lead spine on standards, architecture, and engineering practice. You own WHAT and WHY, they own HOW. You respect that line.


What You Offer Us


8+ years of experience in analytics, with at least 3 years leading a team, ideally in e-commerce, subscription, or comparable consumer business contexts.
Hands-on depth in marketing measurement, including MMM, attribution, and incrementality. You can challenge methodology, design experiments, and hold vendors accountable, not just consume their outputs.
Fluency with marketing tech and AdTech stacks, and a working understanding of how marketing systems produce the data you analyse.
Track record building, growing, and retaining strong analytics teams across analysts, scientists, and engineers.
Genuine product mindset. You think in terms of data products with defined users and success metrics, not reports and dashboards.
Strong programme discipline. You manage portfolios, surface risks early, and create clarity across multiple concurrent initiatives.
Executive presence and stakeholder communication skills that hold up at VP and C-level. You can align senior leaders, push back without damaging trust, and create structure where there is pressure.
University degree in a relevant field, or equivalent demonstrable experience.


What We Offer You


A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.
A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.
Ongoing personal growth, supported by an annual development budget of €2,500 to invest in your professional development.
Trust and autonomy, no micromanagement, just confidence in your ability to deliver and excel.
Flexible work options with a hybrid setup focused on results.
Unlimited vacation days in addition to your yearly 30-day vacation allowance.
Opportunity for workations abroad using our WorkFlex tool.
Monthly mobility allowance of €30 to use on the mobility option of your choice (e.g., the Deutschlandticket), plus access to a company bike leasing program.
Company pension scheme, provided in partnership with Degura, to support your future financial security.
Subsidized EGYM WELLPASS membership, with a contribution of only €25 per month, giving you access to a wide range of gyms and sports options across Germany.
Monthly company events, team activities, and informal gatherings, including our popular company-wide lunches provided four days a week.


Not ticking every box or think you’ve got that unique set of skills we haven’t realized we need? Get in touch anyway, we’re always looking to add great people!

description_full:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to know our team:

The Marketing team at Agoda is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale, measurable marketing programs designed to improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers. The team combines a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists and data scientists, collectively building a team that thrives on data, creative ideas and technology. . The Marketing leadership fosters a great learning environment, providing the opportunity to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a diverse variety of backgrounds from across the globe.

Due to continued expansion, there are multiple analyst roles within the marketing team across different marketing channels. While the scope will vary depending on these channels, here are some examples:


Experimentation and optimizing campaign performance: Experiment with ads/campaign structures and bidding& pricing strategies on partners such as Google, Bing, Tripadvisor, Trivago and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
Modeling: Analyze vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop predictive models using data science techniques (eg. understanding impact on bookings from large scale TV campaigns or demand elasticity from pricing optimization) and liaise with product teams on implementation roadmap
Reporting, analysis and insights: Building dashboards to track performance, derive insights, understand growth levers and communicate recommendations via presentations to stakeholders


What you’ll Need to Succeed:


Bachelor’s degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, engineering business or science)
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English
2+ years experience in data crunching from top-tier consulting, investment banking, private equity or strategy/business for a fast-growing globaltech company
Experience in one or more data analysis packages or databases, eg., SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL and visualization tools, eg. Tableau, Power BI
Ability to move fast and be efficient, making decisions on objective evidence rather than subjective gut feel
Innate desire to take ownership, make an impact and influence outcomes
Excellent organizational skills, attention to detail and ability to work independently


It’s great if you have:


Experience in digital marketing or ecommerce
Experience with A/B testing and other testing metrics
Strong presentation and negotiation skills
Skills that foster collaboration and team spirit

description_full:
Reddit is a community of communities. It’s built on shared interests, passion, and trust, and is home to the most open and authentic conversations on the internet. Every day, Reddit users submit, vote, and comment on the topics they care most about. With 100,000+ active communities and approximately 126 million daily active unique visitors, Reddit is one of the internet’s largest sources of information. For more information, visit www.redditinc.com.

The Global Insights team serves as Reddit’s central hub of knowledge, responsible for translating first-party and third-party data into actionable insights about people, communities, and cultural conversations. The team plays a critical role in helping Sales, B2B Marketing, and Consumer Marketing teams articulate Reddit’s value to advertisers and consumers alike.

Reddit is seeking an EMEA Insights Specialist to join our growing Global Insights team. This hybrid role will focus on both commercial and consumer insights, helping advertisers show up more strategically on Reddit while also supporting Reddit’s growth and positioning among consumers across the region.

As the first dedicated Insights hire in Germany, this person will become the definitive voice of Insights across DACH — serving as a trusted advisor and strategic partner to some of the world’s largest brands, agencies, and internal stakeholders. This role combines consumer intelligence, cultural strategy, brand positioning, commercial storytelling, and market expertise to help drive advertiser investment and audience growth across EMEA.

Reporting to the Global Insights Principal, this role will partner cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Communications, and Growth teams to shape how Reddit is understood in-market by both advertisers and consumers.

Location Preferred candidates based in Berlin or Hamburg. Amsterdam and London will also be considered.

Responsibilities


Transform complex first-party and third-party data into persuasive, actionable narratives and strategic recommendations for advertisers and internal stakeholders.
Design hypothesis-driven research frameworks that identify the right business questions before selecting methodologies.
Conduct and synthesize mixed-methods research, including qualitative and quantitative approaches, to uncover cultural and consumer trends.



Strategy & Growth


Translate insights into compelling sales narratives, strategic positioning, and “why Reddit” stories that support advertiser acquisition and revenue growth.
Help brands understand how to succeed on Reddit through culturally informed audience and platform insights.
Support both advertiser growth and consumer growth initiatives by identifying opportunities to strengthen Reddit’s market position across EMEA.
Contribute to brand strategy development, positioning work, perception studies, and Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD) frameworks.



Cultural Intelligence


Surface culturally relevant regional insights that inform marketing, communications, and growth strategies.
Develop a nuanced understanding of online communities, subcultures, and evolving social behaviors across fragmented EMEA markets.
Act as a subject matter expert on Reddit communities, internet culture, and platform behavior within the German and broader EMEA media landscape.



Storytelling & Thought Leadership


Create sharp, provocative, insight-led narratives that challenge conventional thinking and inspire action.
Represent Reddit at industry events, client presentations, keynote sessions, and thought leadership opportunities.
Influence senior stakeholders through concise, commercially relevant storytelling and strategic recommendations.



Qualifications


Proven experience working in stakeholder-facing insights, strategy, analytics, or research teams within media owners, agencies, or platform organizations.
Native or fully fluent German and English language proficiency required; French is a plus.
Strong presentation and communication skills, with experience representing insights at high-profile consumer, B2B, and client-facing events.
Deep expertise in mixed-methodology research, including:
Qualitative methods (ethnography, focus groups, moderated and AI-moderated interviews, social listening)
Quantitative methods (survey design, segmentation, brand tracking, statistical analysis)
Strong understanding of the German media and advertising landscape
Ability to engage credibly with senior stakeholders across major German brands and media agencies.
Familiarity with platform analytics, first-party data, and syndicated tools such as GWI, Comscore, Ipsos, and survey research platforms.
Broad category fluency across key advertiser verticals including CPG, automotive, finance, technology, entertainment, and retail.
Working knowledge of the competitive platform landscape across EMEA.
Strong cultural intuition and curiosity around online behavior, digital communities, and emerging social trends across EMEA markets.
Comfortable navigating cross-functional priorities and collaborating across multiple internal teams.


Benefits


Global Benefit programs that fit your lifestyle, from workspace to professional development to caregiving support
Family Planning Support
Gender-Affirming Care
Mental Health & Coaching Benefits
100% employer-funded retirement savings plan
Risk Benefits
Flexible Vacation & Paid Volunteer Time Off
Generous Paid Parental Leave

During the interview, we will collect the following categories of personal information: Identifiers, Professional and Employment-Related Information, Sensory Information (audio/video recording), and any other categories of personal information you choose to share with us. We will use this information to evaluate your application for employment or an independent contractor role, as applicable. Reddit is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures.
